title: Apple Global Experience Product Launch
desc: Apple multi-city, multi-day product reveal across NYC/London/Shanghai. iPhone 17e, MacBook Pro M5, budget MacBook, iPad Air, possible Studio Display.

title: Total Lunar Eclipse Blood Moon March 2026
desc: Last total lunar eclipse for 3 years. 58 min totality. Visible from N. America, Pacific, Australia, E. Asia. Color depends on atmospheric conditions.

title: SpaceX Starship Flight 12 Block 3 Launch
desc: First Starship test of 2026. Block 3 vehicles, Raptor 3 engines, new Pad 2. Suborbital mission. Booster catch attempt.

title: Trump Section 122 Tariff Constitutional Challenge
desc: After SCOTUS struck down IEEPA tariffs, Trump imposed new tariffs under Section 122. Never used this way. Legal challenges expected within days.

title: Iran US Nuclear Crisis Deal or Strike
desc: Largest US Middle East military buildup since 2003. Trump gave Iran 10-15 days to agree to deal. Indirect talks via Oman. Outcomes range from historic deal to military strikes.

title: Ukraine Russia Belarus Peace Negotiations
desc: Three rounds of Belarus talks. Kuleba-Lavrov first meeting since war began. Multi-tiered Western enforcement plan. Russia insists no ceasefire without comprehensive settlement.

title: Champions League Round of 16 Draw
desc: UEFA draws knockout matchups at Nyon HQ. Determines R16 first legs Mar 10-11. Arsenal, Chelsea, Liverpool, Atletico Madrid await opponents.

title: World Baseball Classic 2026 Pool Stage
desc: 20 national teams in 4 pools. Pool play Mar 5-11 in Miami, Houston, San Juan, Tokyo. US vs Italy/Mexico/Brazil/GB in Pool B.

title: 98th Academy Awards Oscars Ceremony
desc: Sinners leads with record 16 noms. PTA's One Battle After Another has 13. New Best Casting category. Conan O'Brien hosts. Dolby Theatre.

title: NCAA March Madness Selection Sunday
desc: 68-team bracket revealed on CBS. Duke projected #1 overall seed. Bubble teams learn fate. First Four begins Mar 17.

title: Trump State of the Union Aftermath
desc: SOTU delivered Feb 24. Congressional reactions, poll movements, legislative responses to tariff crisis. Spanberger gave Democratic response.

title: February 2026 Blizzard Aftermath Polar Vortex
desc: Blizzard of 2026 dumped 2-3 feet on NE US. Polar vortex collapse. Recovery, infrastructure damage. March pattern: continued cold or abrupt thaw?
